source_meta.source_document: CORAIL Total Hip System and PINNACLE Acetabular Cup System

systems.system_notes: Primary total hip arthroplasty platform combining the CORAIL femoral stem family with the PINNACLE acetabular cup system.

trays.tray_notes: Official product materials support the combined stem and acetabular platform with dedicated operative instrumentation.

components.component_notes: Official DePuy Synthes materials describe CORAIL as the HA-coated primary femoral stem family.
Official product materials describe PINNACLE as the core acetabular cup family.
Official product materials describe crosslinked polyethylene and related PINNACLE liner options.
DePuy hip portfolio materials pair the platform with modular femoral head options.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Public-facing source pages describe the implant families but do not expose a direct SKU table in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper brochure or IFU pass is required for product-code expansion.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction captures tray and implant-family rows only.
